lessons.title: S212 — Oppression and Disregard of Members' Interests
lessons.description: If there is one shareholder remedy you must know inside and out for the FE-1 exam, it is this one.

lessons.title: The Rule in Foss v Harbottle and the Derivative Action
lessons.description: In our last lesson, we explored Section 212 — the most important shareholder remedy in Irish company law.
